title: Monaco Victory Carousel
caption: From underdogs to champions. The story of our first E1 victory in Monaco, told in five frames.
slides: [{"slide":1,"text":"Nobody gave us a chance.","visual":"Monaco harbor at dawn"},{"slide":2,"text":"But we had belief.","visual":"Pit crew preparation"},{"slide":3,"text":"Lap 3. The overtake.","visual":"Race action shot"},{"slide":4,"text":"The moment it changed.","visual":"Crossing finish line"},{"slide":5,"text":"This is what rising looks like.","visual":"Team celebration"}]

storyboard.title: Monaco Victory: The Moment That Changed Everything
